title: Identify Failure Modes
description: Stress-test a design by enumerating how it breaks.
content:
Here's my design/system: {{design}}

Do a failure-mode analysis. For each component and dependency, ask: what happens when it's slow, unavailable, returns garbage, or partially fails? Identify single points of failure, cascading-failure risks, and missing timeouts/retries/backpressure. Rank the failure modes by likelihood x impact and tell me the top three to address first.
